div.p: Component: Write-Ahead Log (WAL) Manager Logic: Periodic state persistence & log truncation Reference: Intel Manual / Storage Engine Spec §4.12

g.text: sizeof(WAL_THREAD_CTX) = 64 bytes (aligned to L1 cache line)

ol.li: BufferSync(): Flush all dirty buffers to OS
fsync(): Ensure persistence on physical platter

ul.li: Cannot truncate segments required for streaming replication
